author: Aaij, Roel and others
title: Evidence for the decay ${B}_s^0\to {\overline{K}}^{\ast 0}{\mu}^{+}{\mu}^{-}$
abstract: a search for the decay $B^0_s \to K^{\ast0} \mu^+ \mu^-$, using data sets corresponding to 1.0, 2.0 and 1.6 fb$^{−1}$ of integrated luminosity collected during $pp$ collisions at centre-of-mass energies of 7, 8 and 13 TeV, respectively
